translations.en: I want to cross the street.
translations.hi: मैं सड़क पार करना चाहता हूँ।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in present tense (1st sg); selects the bare infinitive 'überqueren'.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Straße'.
Common noun; feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'überqueren'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'; denotes the crossing action.

sentences.target: Wir müssen hier den Fluss überqueren.

translations.de: Wir müssen hier den Fluss überqueren.
translations.en: We have to cross the river here.
translations.es: Tenemos que cruzar el río aquí.
translations.fr: Nous devons traverser la rivière ici.
translations.pt: Temos que atravessar o rio aqui.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לחצות את הנהר כאן.
translations.vi: Chúng ta phải băng qua con sông ở đây.
translations.nl: We moeten hier de rivier oversteken.
translations.hi: हमें यहाँ नदी पार करनी है।
translations.el: Πρέπει να περάσουμε το ποτάμι εδώ.
translations.id: Kita harus menyeberangi sungai di sini.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää ylittää joki tässä kohtaa.
translations.ja: ここで川を渡らないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in present tense (1st pl); expresses obligation and selects the infinitive.
Locative adverb; specifies place ('here').
Definite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Fluss'.
Common noun; masculine; direct object (accusative) of 'überqueren'.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'müssen'.

sentences.target: Kinder sollen die Straße am Zebrastreifen überqueren.
sentences.reading: /ˈkɪndɐ ˈzɔlən diː ˈʃtʁaːsə am ˈt͡seːbʁaˌʃtʁaɪ̯fən ˌyːbɐˈkveːʁən/

translations.de: Kinder sollen die Straße am Zebrastreifen überqueren.
translations.ipa: /ˈkɪndɐ ˈzɔlən diː ˈʃtʁaːsə am ˈt͡seːbʁaˌʃtʁaɪ̯fən ˌyːbɐˈkveːʁən/
translations.en: Children should cross the street at the crosswalk.
translations.es: Los niños deben cruzar la calle por el paso de peatones.
translations.fr: Les enfants devraient traverser la rue au passage piéton.
translations.it: I bambini dovrebbero attraversare la strada sulle strisce.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们应该在斑马线过马路。
translations.yue: 小朋友應該喺斑馬線過馬路。
translations.ru: Детям следует переходить дорогу по пешеходному переходу.
translations.pt: As crianças devem atravessar a rua na faixa de pedestres.
translations.he: ילדים צריכים לחצות את הכביש במעבר חצייה.
translations.vi: Trẻ em nên qua đường ở vạch sang đường.
translations.ar: يجب أن يعبر الأطفال الشارع عند ممر المشاة.
translations.nl: Kinderen moeten de straat oversteken bij het zebrapad.
translations.uk: Діти мають переходити дорогу на пішохідному переході.
translations.hu: A gyerekeknek a zebrán kell átkelniük.
translations.hi: बच्चों को ज़ेब्रा क्रॉसिंग पर सड़क पार करनी चाहिए।
translations.pl: Dzieci powinny przechodzić przez ulicę na pasach.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά πρέπει να περνούν τον δρόμο από τη διάβαση.
translations.nb: Barn bør krysse veien i fotgjengerfeltet.
translations.id: Anak-anak sebaiknya menyeberang jalan di zebra cross.
translations.sv: Barn bör gå över gatan vid övergångsstället.
translations.ro: Copiii ar trebui să traverseze strada pe la trecerea de pietoni.
translations.cs: Děti by měly přecházet ulici na přechodu pro chodce.
translations.da: Børn bør krydse vejen i fodgængerfeltet.
translations.ja: 子どもは横断歩道で道を渡るべきだ。

tokens.explanation: Common noun; plural; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in present tense (3rd pl); expresses obligation/expectation and selects the infinitive.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Straße'.
Common noun; feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'überqueren'.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem'); governs dative; introduces the PP 'am Zebrastreifen'.
Compound common noun; masculine; object of the preposition 'am' (dative singular).
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'sollen'.

sentences.target: Du kannst die Straße alleine überqueren.

translations.de: Du kannst die Straße alleine überqueren.
translations.en: You can cross the street on your own.
translations.es: Puedes cruzar la calle por tu cuenta.
translations.fr: Tu peux traverser la rue par toi-même.
translations.it: Puoi attraversare la strada per conto tuo.
translations.ko: 너 혼자서 길을 건널 수 있어.
translations.pt: Você pode atravessar a rua por conta própria.
translations.he: אתה יכול לחצות את הרחוב לבד.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể tự qua đường.
translations.nl: Je kunt de straat zelf oversteken.
translations.hu: Egyedül is át tudsz menni az úton.
translations.hi: तुम अकेले सड़क पार कर सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να περάσεις τον δρόμο μόνος σου.
translations.sv: Du kan gå över gatan själv.
translations.ro: Poți să traversezi strada pe cont propriu.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary in present tense (2nd sg); expresses ability and selects the infinitive.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Straße'.
Common noun; feminine; direct object (accusative) of 'überqueren'.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb phrase, indicating without assistance.
Bare infinitive lexical verb; complement of the modal 'kannst'.
